title: Vivillon Overhaul (Cobblemon)
description: Overhauls Vivillon and its pre-evolutions to fix the many issues regarding them (Cobblemon).
body:
## Vivillon Overhaul

**Massively reworks Vivillon and its pre-evolutions** to properly reflect the games with how they evolve, aswell as fixing many key issues like getting multiple different Vivillon patterns in one biome, not being able to read Vivillons unique dex entries, Scatterbug not being able to spawn in forest biomes with tall trees, and more! **Comprehensive list of changes are located in the changelog.**

![Vivillon and its pre-evolutions in a jungle, in places they couldn't spawn before!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ad216770cfc16d8ed96892e7db527cdb3e08989.png)

### Compatibility
Currently only has explicit **support for Terralith, WWEE, BOP, BWG, Nature's Spirit, and more (full list in changelog), aswell as vanilla biomes**, Vivillon and its pre-evolutions will **only spawn in biomes with explicit support**.

![Vivillon and its pre-evolutions in a modded biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6161ef7e42eb31d76e0e37023e8dfc3f0b34ba40.png)

### Can I install this on my current world?
Yes, but your **current** Scatterbugs and Spewpas **will only be able to evolve into the Meadow pattern Vivillon**.

![Herd of Ocean pattern Vivillon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20ea3040b62187528130f79ea884a34e533070be.png)
